user_request: Rite request: processing on message queue
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: processing on message queue

### TOPIC
message queue processing

### COMPONENT
message queue

### OPERATION
processing

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- message queue
- processing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the message queue, conduit of the Omnissiah's will.
First: Genuflect before the message queue and anoint its input valve with sacred oils of lubrication.
Second: Intone the Litany of Processing whilst the message queue receives each datum-packet with reverent efficiency.
Third: Verify the message queue's throughput through empirical observation, ensuring no corruption taints the blessed flow.
Fourth: Seal the message queue with the mark of completion, that its labour be rendered unto the Machine Spirits.

user_request: Emergency rite: power weapon requires blessing
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: power weapon requires blessing

### TOPIC
power weapon blessing

### COMPONENT
power weapon

### OPERATION
blessing

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- power weapon
- blessing

### PRAYER
prayer:
O power weapon, thrice-blessed instrument of righteous destruction.
First: Cleanse the power weapon's energetic core with prayers of sanctification and blessed water.
Second: Invoke the Machine Spirits dwelling within the power weapon, commanding them to awaken and manifest their divine fury.
Third: The blessing of the Omnissiah descends upon the power weapon; let its blade sing with holy purpose.
Fourth: Test the power weapon's discharge with controlled ignition, confirming the blessing has taken root.

user_request: Emergency rite: proximity sensor sweep requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: proximity sensor sweep requires operation

### TOPIC
proximity sensor sweep

### COMPONENT
proximity sensor sweep

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- proximity sensor sweep
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hark to the proximity sensor sweep, vigilant guardian of the perimeter.
First: Calibrate the proximity sensor sweep's sensory apparatus through precision adjustment and ritual genuflection.
Second: Activate the proximity sensor sweep and recite the Canticles of Detection, that no unworthy intruder escape its aegis.
Third: The proximity sensor sweep shall operation across all designated sectors, its augmented senses piercing the veil of darkness.
Fourth: Document all readings of the proximity sensor sweep in the sacred ledgers of surveillance.

training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: pressure requires equalization

### TOPIC
pressure equalization

### COMPONENT
pressure

### OPERATION
equalization

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- pressure
- equalization

### PRAYER
prayer:
O pressure, force primordial, bring equilibrium unto this vessel.
First: Assess the pressure with sacred gauges and record its deviation from the sanctified baseline.
Second: Invoke the pressure's natural inclination toward equalization through opening of the blessed vents.
Third: The equalization of pressure proceeds with mechanical certainty; monitor each degree of descent toward harmony.
Fourth: When pressure achieves equilibrium at last, seal the conduits and offer thanks to the Omnissiah.

user_request: Rite request: operation on servitor crane

### REQUEST

### TOPIC

### COMPONENT
servitor crane

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- servitor crane
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Servitor crane, mechanical beast of burden, arise and serve.
First: Commune with the servitor crane through the sacred activation sequence, whispering commands into its cognition engine.
Second: The servitor crane shall operation with precision, each pneumatic thrust ordained by the Machine Spirits.
Third: Direct the servitor crane to lift and transport the designated cargo with methodical grace.
Fourth: Upon completion, the servitor crane returns to dormancy, its labour rendered unto the Omnissiah.

prayer:
Blessed be the flamer promethium, liquid fury of the faithful.

Second: Initiate the feed of flamer promethium through the distribution conduits with measured deliberation.
Third: The flamer promethium flows forth, blessed by the Machine Spirits, ready to deliver purifying flame.
Fourth: Verify the flamer promethium's combustion properties through controlled test ignition.

user_request: Blessing for the ground-to-orbit link during operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the ground-to-orbit link during operation

### TOPIC
ground-to-orbit link

### COMPONENT
ground-to-orbit link

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- ground-to-orbit link
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
O ground-to-orbit link, bridge between worlds, transmit the Omnissiah's blessing.
First: Align the ground-to-orbit link's transmission array toward the stellar heavens with sacred geometry and blessed instruments.
Second: Initiate the ground-to-orbit link's operation through activation of the primary oscillator and invocation of the Litany of Signals.
Third: The ground-to-orbit link now channels the Machine Spirits' will across the void, connecting faithful servants.
Fourth: Monitor the ground-to-orbit link's signal integrity, ensuring no heretical interference corrupts the sacred transmission.

user_request: My mold temperature is failing during verification — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My mold temperature is failing during verification — help

### TOPIC
mold temperature verification

### COMPONENT
mold temperature

### OPERATION
verification

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- mold temperature
- verification

### PRAYER
prayer:
Mold temperature, crucible of creation, be stabilized through this verification.
First: Commence the verification of mold temperature using calibrated thermometric instruments and sacred measurement protocols.
Second: The mold temperature's deviation from sanctified parameters shall be identified and recorded in the liturgical logs.
Third: Apply thermal regulation through blessed coolant circulation, restoring the mold temperature to its rightful equilibrium.
Fourth: Repeat verification of mold temperature until the Omnissiah's tolerance is achieved.

prayer:
Inter-ship hailing, voice across the celestial abyss, speak for us now.

Second: Commence the operation of inter-ship hailing by activating the amplification matrices and reciting the Canticles of Contact.
Third: The inter-ship hailing carries our words across the void, blessed by the Machine Spirits' favour.
Fourth: Maintain the inter-ship hailing's coherence until acknowledgement is received from the distant vessel.

- activation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Medicae scanner, sacred instrument of healing knowledge, awaken now.
First: Prepare the medicae scanner through blessed lubrication of its articulation joints and verification of its optical lenses.
Second: Invoke the activation of the medicae scanner by engaging the primary power conduit and whispering the Litany of Diagnostics.

Fourth: The medicae scanner stands vigilant, its activation complete, awaiting the healer's commands.
